No assessment Iran could strike London, UK minister saysSteve Reed says there is "no specific assessment" Iran is capable of hitting the UK, after Israel claimed it now could. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crm120x4lzxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crm120x4lzxo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 17:45:50 GMT
Three golds in 28 minutes - GB makes history at World Athletics Indoor ChampionshipsGreat Britain claim three golds in a sensational 28 minutes to make history and achieve the team's best-ever haul at the World Athletics Indoor Championships. https://www.bbc.com/sport/athletics/articles/c20qjlyezjvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/athletics/articles/c20qjlyezjvo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 20:59:23 GMT
Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and propertiesThe violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 21:52:28 GMT

Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continuesTravellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cede0qyvqz3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cede0qyvqz3o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 18:15:59 GMT
Jorginho's criticism of Chappell Roan over daughter's tears goes viralEx-Chelsea and Arsenal midfielder Jorginho goes viral with a social media post alleging singer Chappell Roan's security guard made his daughter cry. https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/c4gdryn1ky8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/c4gdryn1ky8o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 15:06:54 GMT
Hawaii storms have caused $1bn in damage, governor saysThe full scale of the damages to roads and other infrastructure from rain and flooding in the state must still be assessed, Gov Josh Green says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czxrdxn6qwqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czxrdxn6qwqo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 20:24:27 GMT
